name: reunion-intent-gate
description: On-device travel-intent gate for Reunion (Variant B: Apple Foundation Models).

scripts.sidecar:smoke: cd sidecar && swift build -c release >/dev/null && printf '%s\n' '{"window":"we should do a trip to Lisbon in September"}' '{"window":"did you watch the game last night"}' | ./.build/release/intent-sidecar
